Football: UEFA Europa League - studio
Football: UEFA Europa League - semi-final match: Nottingham Forest FC - Aston Villa FC
Football: UEFA Europa League - studio
Football: UEFA Europa League - shortcuts
Football: UEFA Conference League - semi-final match: Shakhtar Donetsk - Crystal Palace FC
Football: UEFA Europa League - semi-final match: SC Braga - SC Freiburg
programme.desc: Both SC Freiburg and SC Braga will enter the semi-final of the Europa League in not the best form.The Germans were eliminated from the domestic cup, and in the last league match they lost 0:4 to Borussia Dortmund.The Portuguese, in turn, lost to Santa Clara 1-2 in the previous round.The team from Freiburg im Breisgau eliminated Celta Vigo in the quarterfinals, winning both games 3-1 and 3-0.The team from Braga turned out to be better than Real Betis.First, he drew at home 1:1, and then won sensationally away 4:2.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - semi-final match: Rayo Vallecano - RC Strasbourg
UEFA Europa League Magazine
programme.desc: Match highlights, as well as goals and interesting situations that took place in the last round of the Europa League.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Conference League - semi-final match: Shakhtar Donetsk - Crystal Palace FC
Football: UEFA Conference League - semi-final match: Rayo Vallecano - RC Strasbourg
Football: UEFA Europa League - studio
Football: English League - match: Nottingham Forest FC - Aston Villa FC
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest defeated Tottenham Hotspur (3-0) in the previous round, thus moving away from the relegation zone.However, it still cannot feel safe - each subsequent loss of points may prove decisive in the fight for relegation.In the next series of matches he will face Aston Villa.This one also has its problems.In the last five league matches, it had to admit its opponents' superiority four times.However, in the previous round the Lions defeated West Ham (2-0), which may be a signal of a return to form.

programme.title: Football: UEFA Europa League - studio
UEFA Europa League Magazine
programme.desc: Match highlights, as well as goals and interesting situations that took place in the last round of the Europa League.

programme.title: Tennis: ATP Tournament in Madrid
Football: English League - match: Nottingham Forest FC - Aston Villa FC
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest defeated Tottenham Hotspur (3-0) in the previous round, thus moving away from the relegation zone.However, it still cannot feel safe - each subsequent loss of points may prove decisive in the fight for relegation.In the next series of matches he will face Aston Villa.This one also has its problems.In the last five league matches, it had to admit its opponents' superiority four times.However, in the previous round the Lions defeated West Ham (2-0), which may be a signal of a return to form.

Football: UEFA Europa League - match: SC Braga - Feyenoord Rotterdam
UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Odense - Wisła Kraków 01.12.2011 - sezon 2011/2012
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: Archived UEFA Cup finals
programme.sub-title: FC Liverpool - Deportivo Alaves (2001)
programme.desc: A program that briefly presents the UEFA Cup finals, from the time when the two-legged final was replaced by one match in 1998, until the competition was transformed into the Europa League in the 2008/09 season.During this time, the games slowly changed their form.From the 1999/2000 season, teams that took third place in the Champions League group stage joined the competition.In the 2004/05 season, the cup system was changed to a group-cup system.There were qualifying rounds and the first round in a two-legged format.In the second round, the teams were divided into groups of five, but they played only one match against each other.24 teams advanced to the third round, joined by eight teams from the third places of the Champions League group stage.From the third round, a two-legged system was used until the final, which was played as one match from 1998. The final match of the UEFA Cup in the 2000/2001 season was an incredible spectacle that fans will remember for decades.The revelation of the competition, Deportivo Alaves, faced the favored Liverpool.The Spanish team defeated Kaiserslautern 9-2 in the semi-final.This result was a preview of the great emotions that this team was to provide fans with in the fight against The Reds.It was an extraordinary match, full of twists and spectacular moves.A great football show that was a great answer to the question why so many people around the world love football.

programme.title: Tennis: ATP Tournament in Madrid - 4th round singles match
Football: UEFA Europa League - match: FC Salzburg - FC Porto
UEFA Conference League Archive
programme.sub-title: Fiorentina - Lech Poznań - 20.04.2024 - 1/4 finału - sezon 2022/2023 - 2. mecz

Women's football: English League - match: Tottenham Hotspur FC - Manchester United WFC
Football: Czech league - match: SK Slavia Prague - SK Sigma Olomouc
Football: German League - match: RB Leipzig - 1. FC Union Berlin
programme.desc: Until recently, it seemed that RB Leipzig could only fight to finish the season in third place.However, Borussia Dortmund surprised with two defeats in a row and the Red Bulls will certainly try to fight for the runner-up position.In the 31st round they will face Union Berlin, which is not in the best shape - in the last four matches it recorded one draw and three defeats.With this victory, the team from Leipzig can extend its series of league wins - they have four of them so far.

programme.title: Football: Dutch league - match: PSV Eindhoven - PEC Zwolle
Football: German league - match: Borussia Dortmund - SC Freiburg
Football: Italian league - match: Bologna FC - AS Roma
Women's football: English League - match: Tottenham Hotspur FC - Manchester United WFC
Men's basketball: Euroleague - play-off match: Valencia Basket - Panathinaikos ACTOR Athens
Football: Dutch league - match: PSV Eindhoven - PEC Zwolle
Football: Czech league - match: SK Slavia Prague - SK Sigma Olomouc
Football: German league - match: Borussia Dortmund - SC Freiburg
Football: Italian league - match: Bologna FC - AS Roma
Football: German League - match: 1. FSV Mainz 05 - FC Bayern Munich
programme.desc: The Bavarians already have the title of German champions in their pocket.Moreover, the team led by Vincent Kompany has already scored 160 goals in all competitions this season.In this way he broke the club record set six years ago.He will try to outdo him in the match against FSV Mainz.However, the Zero-Five can stand up to Bayern, which they proved in December when they drew 2-2 in Munich.They may be tempted to make an even bigger surprise in front of their home crowd, especially since the Munich team will be saving their strength for the first semi-final match of the Champions League against PSG.

programme.title: Football: Scottish League - match: Celtic FC - Falkirk FC
Women's football: English League - match: Tottenham Hotspur FC - Manchester United WFC
Football: Dutch league - match: PSV Eindhoven - PEC Zwolle

programme.desc: Until recently, it seemed that RB Leipzig could only fight to finish the season in third place.However, Borussia Dortmund surprised with two defeats in a row and the Red Bulls will certainly try to fight for the runner-up position.In the 31st round they will face Union Berlin, which is not in the best shape - in the last four matches it recorded one draw and three defeats.With this victory, the team from Leipzig can extend its series of league wins - they have four of them so far.

programme.title: Polsat Sport Talk Extra
programme.sub-title: Piotr Urban
programme.desc: Przemysław Iwańczyk talks about sports with people from outside his circle, including:from culture, medicine, science and politics.Thanks to them, sport appears as a complex process influencing results.

Tennis: ATP Tournament in Madrid - 3rd round singles match
Tennis: ATP Tournament in Madrid - 3rd round singles match
Motorcycle World Championship: Spanish Grand Prix - Moto3 class race
Motorcycle World Championship: Spanish Grand Prix - Moto2 class race
programme.desc: Moto2 is dominated by Spanish riders, who occupy the first three places in the general classification.The leader is Manuel Gonzalez, who did not do well in the US Grand Prix, finishing the race in fifth position.Australian Senna Agius won the Circuit of the Americas.The biggest surprise of the competition was the result of Daniel Holgado, who finished only 16th.Spanish fans hope that one of their compatriots will win during the competition at the Circuito Permanente de Jerez.

programme.title: Motorcycle World Championship: Spanish Grand Prix - MotoGP class race
Men's basketball: Italian league - match: Napoli Basketball - Dolomiti Energia Trentino
Polsat Sport Talk Extra
programme.sub-title: Piotr Urban
programme.desc: Przemysław Iwańczyk talks about sports with people from outside his circle, including:from culture, medicine, science and politics.Thanks to them, sport appears as a complex process influencing results.

programme.desc: Moto2 is dominated by Spanish riders, who occupy the first three places in the general classification.The leader is Manuel Gonzalez, who did not do well in the US Grand Prix, finishing the race in fifth position.Australian Senna Agius won the Circuit of the Americas.The biggest surprise of the competition was the result of Daniel Holgado, who finished only 16th.Spanish fans hope that one of their compatriots will win during the competition at the Circuito Permanente de Jerez.

Polish Sport Magazine
programme.desc: A program devoted to events in Polish sport.There will be information from various disciplines, analyzes and conversations with players on various topics, not only those strictly related to professional sports.

programme.title: 7th zone
programme.desc: The program covers the PlusLiga, TAURON Liga and Champions League competitions.It will also include materials devoted to the Polish national team.

programme.sub-title: Karabin dowolny
programme.desc: Viewers will learn about various sports shooting competitions.They will learn how to start training and learn the differences between individual weapons, including:a smoothbore shotgun and a ball rifle.

programme.title: Naval Shooting Range
programme.sub-title: Karabinki AK
programme.desc: The program introduces viewers to the secrets of shooting.Types of weapons will be characterized and issues related to, among others, discussed:with hunting.Polish sports stars will be subjected to shooting tests.

Boxing: Polsat Boxing Promotions 10 in Łódź - super middleweight: Osleys Iglesias - Ezequiel Maderna 24/09/2022
programme.desc: El Tornado de Cuba, Osleys Iglesias tied his fate with Poland.Since December 2021, he has appeared in galas organized by Polsat Boxing Promotions three times and emerged victorious three times.The talented Cuban's opponent will be a very experienced boxer from Argentina.35-year-old Ezequiel Maderna has 35 professional fights, 27 of which he won.Recently, however, he has not had a good streak and has suffered three defeats in a row.In March 2022, he was defeated by, among others, Paweł Stępień.

programme.title: Combat sports: UFC Fight Night - fight: Mario Bautista - Vinicius Oliveira 08/02/2026
Boxing: Rocky Boxing Night in Stężyca - heavyweight: Kacper Meyna - Jakub Sosiński 11/02/2023
